item.title: Arfin India Joins Reliable Performers List Following Strong Q4 Financials
item.description: Arfin India, a micro-cap player in the non-ferrous metals sector, has been added to the esteemed Reliable Performers list as of 11 May 2026, following a series of outstanding quarterly results that underscore its improving fundamentals and growth trajectory. The stock’s recent bullish momentum and significant financial improvements position it as a compelling addition for investors seeking consistent performance in a challenging market environment. Time: May 11 2026 10:30 PM IST

item.title: Canara Bank Q4 FY26: Asset Quality Shines Despite Profit Dip
item.description: Canara Bank Ltd., one of India's leading public sector lenders with a market capitalisation of ₹1,19,506 crores, reported a net profit of ₹4,505.57 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a sequential decline of 12.60% from Q3 FY26's ₹5,155.11 crores and a year-on-year drop of 9.94% from Q4 FY25's ₹5,002.66 crores. Despite the profit contraction, the bank delivered stellar improvements in asset quality metrics, with gross non-performing assets declining to a multi-quarter low of 1.84% and net NPAs compressing to just 0.43%, underscoring robust credit discipline and provisioning strength. Time: May 11 2026 09:47 PM IST
